1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"net/http"
     5→
     6→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     7→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
     8→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
     9→)
    10→
    11→// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
    12→type Dependencies struct {
    13→	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
    14→	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
    15→	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
    16→	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
    17→	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
    18→	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
    19→	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
    20→	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
    21→	AgentStore            AgentStore
    22→	TodosStore            TodosStore
    23→	PublicURL             string
    24→	KeyStore              KeyStore
    25→	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
    26→	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
    27→	NoAuth                bool
    28→	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
    29→	HTTPClient            *http.Client
    30→}
    31→
    32→// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
    33→func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
    34→	// Public chain: no auth required.
    35→	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)
    36→
    37→	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
    38→	chain := publicChain
    39→	if !deps.NoAuth {
    40→		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
    41→	}
    42→
    43→	// Projects (CRUD)
    44→	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
    45→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
    46→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
    47→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
    48→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
    49→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))
    50→
    51→	// Sources (nested under projects)
    52→	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
    53→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
    54→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
    55→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
    56→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
    57→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
    58→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))
    59→
    60→	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
    61→	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
    62→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
    63→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
    64→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
    65→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
    66→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))
    67→
    68→	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
    69→	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
    70→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
    71→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
    72→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
    73→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))
    74→
    75→	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
    76→	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
    77→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
    78→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
    79→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
    80→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
    81→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))
    82→
    83→	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
    84→	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
    85→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
    86→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
    87→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))
    88→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchDelete)))
    89→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
    90→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
    91→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))
    92→
    93→	// Channels (CRUD + test)
    94→	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore, routing.NewSenders(), deps.PublicURL)
    95→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
    96→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
    97→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
    98→	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
    99→	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
   100→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Test)))
   101→
   102→	// Agent
   103→	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
   104→	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
   105→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
   106→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))
   107→
   108→	// Todos
   109→	todos := NewTodosHandler(deps.TodosStore, deps.PublicURL)
   110→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.List)))
   111→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Get)))
   112→	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
   113→	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
   114→	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/reopen", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Reopen)))
   115→	// One-click endpoints for notification links (GET so they work as <a href>)
   116→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
   117→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
   118→
   119→	// Providers (metadata — static, no store needed)
   120→	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
   121→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))
   122→
   123→	// Discovery (public — no auth, proxies external APIs)
   124→	discover := NewDiscoverHandler(deps.HTTPClient, "", "")
   125→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/github", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.GitHub)))
   126→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/dockerhub", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.DockerHub)))
   127→
   128→	// SSE events
   129→	events := NewEventsHandler(deps.Broadcaster)
   130→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/events", chain(http.HandlerFunc(events.Stream)))
   131→
   132→	// Health (public — no auth middleware)
   133→	health := NewHealthHandler(deps.HealthChecker)
   134→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/health", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Check)))
   135→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Stats)))
   136→	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats/trend", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Trend)))
   137→}
   138→

1→package agent
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"encoding/json"
     6→	"fmt"
     7→	"log/slog"
     8→	"time"
     9→
    10→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    11→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/models"
    12→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    13→)
    14→
    15→// AgentWorker is a River worker that processes AgentJobArgs by running the
    16→// LLM agent orchestrator. When a job is dequeued, it loads the corresponding
    17→// agent run from the store and delegates to Orchestrator.RunAgent.
    18→type AgentWorker struct {
    19→	river.WorkerDefaults[queue.AgentJobArgs]
    20→	orchestrator *Orchestrator
    21→	store        OrchestratorStore
    22→}
    23→
    24→// NewAgentWorker creates a new AgentWorker backed by the given orchestrator
    25→// and store.
    26→func NewAgentWorker(orchestrator *Orchestrator, store OrchestratorStore) *AgentWorker {
    27→	return &AgentWorker{
    28→		orchestrator: orchestrator,
    29→		store:        store,
    30→	}
    31→}
    32→
    33→// Timeout overrides River's default 60-second job timeout. Agent runs involve
    34→// multiple LLM round-trips (root agent + sub-agents), each of which can take
    35→// 10-30 seconds, so we allow 5 minutes total.
    36→func (w *AgentWorker) Timeout(_ *river.Job[queue.AgentJobArgs]) time.Duration {
    37→	return 5 * time.Minute
    38→}
    39→
    40→// Work processes a single AgentJobArgs job. It loads the agent run from the
    41→// database and runs the LLM agent through the orchestrator. If the project
    42→// has WaitForAllSources enabled and not all sources have the target version,
    43→// the job is snoozed for 5 minutes via river.JobSnooze.
    44→func (w *AgentWorker) Work(ctx context.Context, job *river.Job[queue.AgentJobArgs]) error {
    45→	slog.Info("agent worker picked up job",
    46→		"job_id", job.ID,
    47→		"agent_run_id", job.Args.AgentRunID,
    48→		"attempt", job.Attempt,
    49→	)
    50→
    51→	run, err := w.store.GetAgentRun(ctx, job.Args.AgentRunID)
    52→	if err != nil {
    53→		slog.Error("agent worker failed to load agent run",
    54→			"job_id", job.ID,
    55→			"agent_run_id", job.Args.AgentRunID,
    56→			"err", err,
    57→		)
    58→		return fmt.Errorf("get agent run: %w", err)
    59→	}
    60→
    61→	// Check multi-source waiting: if the run has a version and the project
    62→	// has WaitForAllSources enabled, verify all sources have reported a
    63→	// release for the target version before running the agent.
    64→	if run.Version != "" {
    65→		project, err := w.store.GetProject(ctx, run.ProjectID)
    66→		if err != nil {
    67→			slog.Error("agent worker failed to load project",
    68→				"job_id", job.ID,
    69→				"project_id", run.ProjectID,
    70→				"err", err,
    71→			)
    72→			return fmt.Errorf("get project: %w", err)
    73→		}
    74→
    75→		var rules models.AgentRules
    76→		if len(project.AgentRules) > 0 {
    77→			if err := json.Unmarshal(project.AgentRules, &rules); err != nil {
    78→				slog.Warn("agent worker: failed to unmarshal agent rules, proceeding without wait",
    79→					"project_id", run.ProjectID, "err", err)
    80→			}
    81→		}
    82→
    83→		if rules.WaitForAllSources {
    84→			ready, err := w.orchestrator.checkAllSourcesReady(ctx, run.ProjectID, run.Version)
    85→			if err != nil {
    86→				slog.Error("agent worker: error checking source readiness",
    87→					"job_id", job.ID,
    88→					"project_id", run.ProjectID,
    89→					"version", run.Version,
    90→					"err", err,
    91→				)
    92→				return fmt.Errorf("check all sources ready: %w", err)
    93→			}
    94→			if !ready {
    95→				// After maxWaitAttempts (12 × 5min = ~1 hour), proceed
    96→				// with partial data rather than waiting forever.
    97→				const maxWaitAttempts = 12
    98→				if job.Attempt >= maxWaitAttempts {
    99→					slog.Warn("agent worker: max wait attempts reached, proceeding with partial data",
   100→						"job_id", job.ID,
   101→						"project_id", run.ProjectID,
   102→						"version", run.Version,
   103→						"attempts", job.Attempt,
   104→					)
   105→				} else {
   106→					slog.Info("agent worker: not all sources ready, snoozing",
   107→						"job_id", job.ID,
   108→						"project_id", run.ProjectID,
   109→						"version", run.Version,
   110→						"attempt", job.Attempt,
   111→					)
   112→					if err := w.store.UpdateAgentRunStatus(ctx, run.ID, "waiting"); err != nil {
   113→						slog.Error("failed to set waiting status", "err", err)
   114→					}
   115→					return river.JobSnooze(5 * time.Minute)
   116→				}
   117→			}
   118→		}
   119→	}
   120→
   121→	slog.Info("agent worker starting run",
   122→		"job_id", job.ID,
   123→		"agent_run_id", run.ID,
   124→		"project_id", run.ProjectID,
   125→		"trigger", run.Trigger,
   126→	)
   127→
   128→	if err := w.orchestrator.RunAgent(ctx, run); err != nil {
   129→		slog.Error("agent worker run failed",
   130→			"job_id", job.ID,
   131→			"agent_run_id", run.ID,
   132→			"project_id", run.ProjectID,
   133→			"err", err,
   134→		)
   135→		return err
   136→	}
   137→
   138→	slog.Info("agent worker run completed",
   139→		"job_id", job.ID,
   140→		"agent_run_id", run.ID,
   141→		"project_id", run.ProjectID,
   142→	)
   143→	return nil
   144→}
   145→

1→package agent
     2→

     8→	"google.golang.org/adk/model/gemini"

    11→	oaimodel "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent/openai"
    12→)
    13→
    14→// LLMConfig holds the configuration for creating an LLM model.
    15→type LLMConfig struct {
    16→	Provider string // "gemini" or "openai"
    17→	Model    string // e.g. "gemini-2.5-flash", "gpt-5.2"
    18→
    19→	// Gemini
    20→	GoogleAPIKey string
    21→
    22→	// OpenAI
    23→	OpenAIAPIKey  string
    24→	OpenAIBaseURL string // defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1
    25→}
    26→
    27→// NewLLMModel creates a model.LLM based on the configured provider.
    28→// wsConfig is optional and only applies to the OpenAI provider; it enables
    29→// the Responses API built-in web_search tool on the created model.
    30→func NewLLMModel(ctx context.Context, cfg LLMConfig, wsConfig *oaimodel.WebSearch) (model.LLM, error) {
    31→	switch cfg.Provider {
    32→	case "gemini", "":
    33→		if cfg.GoogleAPIKey == "" {
    34→			return nil, fmt.Errorf("GOOGLE_API_KEY is required for gemini provider")
    35→		}
    36→		return gemini.NewModel(ctx, cfg.Model, &genai.ClientConfig{
    37→			APIKey: cfg.GoogleAPIKey,
    38→		})
    39→
    40→	case "openai":
    41→		return oaimodel.NewModel(ctx, cfg.Model, oaimodel.Config{
    42→			APIKey:  cfg.OpenAIAPIKey,
    43→			BaseURL: cfg.OpenAIBaseURL,
    44→		}, wsConfig)
    45→
    46→	default:
    47→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unknown LLM provider: %q (supported: gemini, openai)", cfg.Provider)
    48→	}
    49→}

1→package api
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"crypto/sha256"
     6→	"encoding/hex"
     7→	"fmt"
     8→	"strings"

    11→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5"
    12→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
    13→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    14→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/models"
    15→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    16→)
    17→
    18→// PgStore implements all store interfaces using a PostgreSQL connection pool.
    19→type PgStore struct {
    20→	pool  *pgxpool.Pool
    21→	river *river.Client[pgx.Tx]
    22→}
    23→
    24→// NewPgStore returns a new PgStore backed by the given connection pool and River client.
    25→// The river client may be nil if agent triggering is not needed.
    26→func NewPgStore(pool *pgxpool.Pool, riverClient *river.Client[pgx.Tx]) *PgStore {
    27→	return &PgStore{pool: pool, river: riverClient}
    28→}
    29→
    30→// SetRiverClient updates the River client on an existing PgStore.
    31→// This is used during bootstrap to inject the client after worker registration.
    32→func (s *PgStore) SetRiverClient(rc *river.Client[pgx.Tx]) {
    33→	s.river = rc
    34→}
    35→
    36→// --- ProjectsStore ---
    37→
    38→func (s *PgStore) ListProjects(ctx context.Context, page, perPage int) ([]models.Project, int, error) {
    39→	var total int
    40→	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM projects`).Scan(&total)
    41→	if err != nil {
    42→		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("count projects: %w", err)
    43→	}
    44→	offset := (page - 1) * perPage
    45→	rows, err := s.pool.Query(ctx,
    46→		`SELECT id, name, COALESCE(description,''), COALESCE(agent_prompt,''),
    47→		        COALESCE(agent_rules,'{}'), created_at, updated_at
    48→		 FROM projects ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2`, perPage, offset)
    49→	if err != nil {
    50→		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("list projects: %w", err)
    51→	}
    52→	defer rows.Close()
    53→	var projects []models.Project
    54→	for rows.Next() {
    55→		var p models.Project
    56→		if err := rows.Scan(&p.ID, &p.Name, &p.Description, &p.AgentPrompt, &p.AgentRules, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt); err != nil {
    57→			return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("scan project: %w", err)
    58→		}
    59→		projects = append(projects, p)
    60→	}
    61→	return projects, total, nil
    62→}
    63→
    64→func (s *PgStore) CreateProject(ctx context.Context, p *models.Project) error {
    65→	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    66→		`INSERT INTO projects (name, description, agent_prompt, agent_rules)
    67→		 VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
    68→		 RETURNING id, created_at, updated_at`,
    69→		p.Name, p.Description, p.AgentPrompt, p.AgentRules,
    70→	).Scan(&p.ID, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt)
    71→}
    72→
    73→func (s *PgStore) GetProject(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.Project, error) {
    74→	var p models.Project
    75→	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    76→		`SELECT id, name, COALESCE(description,''), COALESCE(agent_prompt,''),
    77→		        COALESCE(agent_rules,'{}'), created_at, updated_at
    78→		 FROM projects WHERE id = $1`, id,
    79→	).Scan(&p.ID, &p.Name, &p.Description, &p.AgentPrompt, &p.AgentRules, &p.CreatedAt, &p.UpdatedAt)
    80→	if err != nil {
    81→		return nil, err
    82→	}
    83→	return &p, nil
    84→}
    85→
    86→func (s *PgStore) UpdateProject(ctx context.Context, id string, p *models.Project) error {
    87→	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
    88→		`UPDATE projects SET name=$1, description=$2, agent_prompt=$3, agent_rules=$4, updated_at=NOW()
    89→		 WHERE id=$5 RETURNING updated_at`,
    90→		p.Name, p.Description, p.AgentPrompt, p.AgentRules, id,
    91→	).Scan(&p.UpdatedAt)
    92→}
    93→
    94→func (s *PgStore) DeleteProject(ctx context.Context, id string) error {
    95→	tag, err := s.pool.Exec(ctx, `DELETE FROM projects WHERE id = $1`, id)
    96→	if err != nil {
    97→		return err
    98→	}
    99→	if tag.RowsAffected() == 0 {
   100→		return fmt.Errorf("not found")

1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"log/slog"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"os/signal"
     9→	"time"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    12→	agentpkg "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent"
    13→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/api"
    14→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/db"
    15→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
    16→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    17→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
    18→)
    19→
    20→func main() {
    21→	// Configure log level from LOG_LEVEL env (debug, info, warn, error).
    22→	logLevel := new(slog.LevelVar) // defaults to Info
    23→	switch os.Getenv("LOG_LEVEL") {
    24→	case "debug":
    25→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelDebug)
    26→	case "warn":
    27→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelWarn)
    28→	case "error":
    29→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelError)
    30→	}
    31→	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stderr, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: logLevel})))
    32→
    33→	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
    34→	defer stop()
    35→
    36→	dbURL := envOr("DATABASE_URL", "postgres://localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable")
    37→	addr := envOr("LISTEN_ADDR", ":8080")
    38→	noAuth := os.Getenv("NO_AUTH") == "true"
    39→
    40→	// Database
    41→	pool, err := db.NewPool(ctx, dbURL)
    42→	if err != nil {
    43→		slog.Error("database connection failed", "err", err)
    44→		os.Exit(1)
    45→	}
    46→	defer pool.Close()
    47→
    48→	if err := db.RunMigrations(ctx, pool); err != nil {
    49→		slog.Error("migrations failed", "err", err)
    50→		os.Exit(1)
    51→	}
    52→
    53→	// API & routing store (created before River so we can register workers)
    54→	// The river client is set to nil initially; TriggerAgentRun (which needs it)
    55→	// won't be called until the server is up and the client is set below.
    56→	pgStore := api.NewPgStore(pool, nil)
    57→
    58→	// Register River workers
    59→	workers := river.NewWorkers()
    60→	notifyWorker := routing.NewNotifyWorker(pgStore, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    61→	river.AddWorker(workers, notifyWorker)
    62→
    63→	// Agent worker: requires an LLM API key. If unavailable, agent jobs
    64→	// will remain in the queue until the key is configured and the server
    65→	// is restarted.
    66→	llmProvider := envOr("LLM_PROVIDER", "gemini")
    67→	llmModelDefault := "gemini-2.5-flash"
    68→	if llmProvider == "openai" {
    69→		llmModelDefault = "gpt-5.2"
    70→	}
    71→	llmConfig := agentpkg.LLMConfig{
    72→		Provider:      llmProvider,
    73→		Model:         envOr("LLM_MODEL", llmModelDefault),
    74→		GoogleAPIKey:  os.Getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY"),
    75→		OpenAIAPIKey:  os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    76→		OpenAIBaseURL: os.Getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL"),
    77→	}
    78→	agentOrchestrator, err := agentpkg.NewOrchestrator(pgStore, llmConfig, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    79→	if err != nil {
    80→		slog.Warn("agent orchestrator not available — agent jobs will not be processed", "err", err)
    81→	} else {
    82→		agentWorker := agentpkg.NewAgentWorker(agentOrchestrator, pgStore)
    83→		river.AddWorker(workers, agentWorker)
    84→		slog.Info("agent worker registered")
    85→	}
    86→
    87→	riverClient, err := queue.NewRiverClient(pool, workers)
    88→	if err != nil {
    89→		slog.Error("river client failed", "err", err)
    90→		os.Exit(1)
    91→	}
    92→
    93→	// Now that the river client exists, set it on the existing pgStore so that
    94→	// all holders (including NotifyWorker) can enqueue agent jobs.
    95→	pgStore.SetRiverClient(riverClient)
    96→
    97→	if err := riverClient.Start(ctx); err != nil {
    98→		slog.Error("river start failed", "err", err)
    99→		os.Exit(1)
   100→	}
   101→
   102→	// Ingestion layer
   103→	ingestionStore := ingestion.NewPgStore(pool, riverClient)
   104→	svc := ingestion.NewService(ingestionStore)
   105→
   106→	loader := ingestion.NewSourceLoader(pool, http.DefaultClient)
   107→	orch := ingestion.NewOrchestrator(svc, loader, pool, 5*time.Minute)
   108→
   109→	broadcaster := api.NewBroadcaster()
   110→
   111→	mux := http.NewServeMux()
   112→
   113→	// Serve frontend static export if available
   114→	if info, err := os.Stat("web/out"); err == nil && info.IsDir() {
   115→		api.RegisterFrontend(mux, "web/out")
   116→		slog.Info("serving frontend from web/out")
   117→	}
   118→
   119→	// Register all API v1 routes
   120→	api.RegisterRoutes(mux, api.Dependencies{
   121→		DB:                    pool,
   122→		ProjectsStore:         pgStore,
   123→		ReleasesStore:         pgStore,
   124→		SubscriptionsStore:    pgStore,
   125→		SourcesStore:          pgStore,
   126→		ChannelsStore:         pgStore,
   127→		ContextSourcesStore:   pgStore,
   128→		SemanticReleasesStore: pgStore,
   129→		AgentStore:            pgStore,
   130→		TodosStore:            pgStore,
   131→		PublicURL:             os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"),
   132→		KeyStore:              pgStore,
   133→		HealthChecker:         pgStore,
   134→		Broadcaster:           broadcaster,
   135→		NoAuth:                noAuth,
   136→		IngestionService:      svc,
   137→		HTTPClient:            http.DefaultClient,
   138→	})
   139→
   140→	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: api.CORS(mux)}
   141→
   142→	// Start polling in background
   143→	go orch.Run(ctx)
   144→
   145→	// Start PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY → SSE bridge
   146→	go api.ListenForNotifications(ctx, pool, broadcaster)
   147→
   148→	// Start HTTP server
   149→	go func() {
   150→		slog.Info("server starting", "addr", srv.Addr)
   151→		if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != http.ErrServerClosed {
   152→			slog.Error("server error", "err", err)
   153→		}
   154→	}()
   155→
   156→	<-ctx.Done()
   157→	slog.Info("shutting down")
   158→
   159→	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
   160→	defer cancel()
   161→	riverClient.Stop(shutdownCtx)
   162→	srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
   163→}
   164→
   165→func envOr(key, fallback string) string {
   166→	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
   167→		return v
   168→	}
   169→	return fallback
   170→}
   171→

1→package models
     2→

     4→	"encoding/json"
     5→	"time"

     8→type Release struct {

1→// web/lib/api/client.ts
     2→import type {
     3→  ApiResponse,
     4→  Project,
     5→  ProjectInput,
     6→  Release,
     7→  Source,
     8→  SourceInput,
     9→  Subscription,
    10→  SubscriptionInput,
    11→  BatchSubscriptionInput,
    12→  BatchDeleteSubscriptionInput,
    13→  NotificationChannel,
    14→  ChannelInput,
    15→  ContextSource,
    16→  ContextSourceInput,
    17→  SemanticRelease,
    18→  AgentRun,
    19→  HealthStatus,
    20→  Stats,
    21→  TrendData,
    22→  DiscoverItem,
    23→  Todo,
    24→} from "./types";
    25→
    26→const BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "/api/v1";
    27→
    28→async function request<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T> {
    29→  const res = await fetch(`${BASE}${path}`, {
    30→    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...init?.headers },
    31→    ...init,
    32→  });
    33→  if (!res.ok) {
    34→    const body = await res.json().catch(() => null);
    35→    throw new Error(body?.error?.message ?? `Request failed: ${res.status}`);
    36→  }
    37→  if (res.status === 204) return null as T;
    38→  return res.json();
    39→}
    40→
    41→// --- Projects ---
    42→
    43→export const projects = {
    44→  list: (page = 1, perPage = 25) =>
    45→    request<ApiResponse<Project[]>>(`/projects?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}`),
    46→  get: (id: string) =>
    47→    request<ApiResponse<Project>>(`/projects/${id}`),
    48→  create: (input: ProjectInput) =>
    49→    request<ApiResponse<Project>>("/projects", {
    50→      method: "POST",
    51→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
    52→    }),
    53→  update: (id: string, input: ProjectInput) =>
    54→    request<ApiResponse<Project>>(`/projects/${id}`, {
    55→      method: "PUT",
    56→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
    57→    }),
    58→  delete: (id: string) =>
    59→    request<ApiResponse<null>>(`/projects/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" }),
    60→};
    61→
    62→// --- Sources (nested under projects) ---
    63→
    64→export const sources = {
    65→  listByProject: (projectId: string, page = 1) =>
    66→    request<ApiResponse<Source[]>>(`/projects/${projectId}/sources?page=${page}`),
    67→  create: (projectId: string, input: SourceInput) =>
    68→    request<ApiResponse<Source>>(`/projects/${projectId}/sources`, {
    69→      method: "POST",
    70→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
    71→    }),
    72→  get: (id: string) =>
    73→    request<ApiResponse<Source>>(`/sources/${id}`),
    74→  update: (id: string, input: SourceInput) =>
    75→    request<ApiResponse<Source>>(`/sources/${id}`, {
    76→      method: "PUT",
    77→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
    78→    }),
    79→  delete: (id: string) =>
    80→    request<ApiResponse<null>>(`/sources/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" }),
    81→  poll: (id: string) =>
    82→    request<ApiResponse<{ new_releases: number }>>(`/sources/${id}/poll`, {
    83→      method: "POST",
    84→    }),
    85→};
    86→
    87→export const releases = {
    88→  list: (page = 1, perPage = 25, includeExcluded = false) =>
    89→    request<ApiResponse<Release[]>>(
    90→      `/releases?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}${includeExcluded ? '&include_excluded=true' : ''}`
    91→    ),
    92→  listBySource: (sourceId: string, page = 1) =>
    93→    request<ApiResponse<Release[]>>(`/sources/${sourceId}/releases?page=${page}`),
    94→  listByProject: (projectId: string, page = 1, perPage = 25, includeExcluded = false) =>
    95→    request<ApiResponse<Release[]>>(
    96→      `/projects/${projectId}/releases?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}${includeExcluded ? '&include_excluded=true' : ''}`
    97→    ),
    98→  get: (id: string) =>
    99→    request<ApiResponse<Release>>(`/releases/${id}`),
   100→};
   101→
   102→// --- Context Sources ---
   103→
   104→export const contextSources = {
   105→  list: (projectId: string, page = 1) =>
   106→    request<ApiResponse<ContextSource[]>>(`/projects/${projectId}/context-sources?page=${page}`),
   107→  create: (projectId: string, input: ContextSourceInput) =>
   108→    request<ApiResponse<ContextSource>>(`/projects/${projectId}/context-sources`, {
   109→      method: "POST",
   110→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   111→    }),
   112→  get: (id: string) =>
   113→    request<ApiResponse<ContextSource>>(`/context-sources/${id}`),
   114→  update: (id: string, input: ContextSourceInput) =>
   115→    request<ApiResponse<ContextSource>>(`/context-sources/${id}`, {
   116→      method: "PUT",
   117→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   118→    }),
   119→  delete: (id: string) =>
   120→    request<ApiResponse<null>>(`/context-sources/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" }),
   121→};
   122→
   123→// --- Semantic Releases ---
   124→
   125→export const semanticReleases = {
   126→  listAll: (page = 1, perPage = 25) =>
   127→    request<ApiResponse<SemanticRelease[]>>(`/semantic-releases?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}`),
   128→  list: (projectId: string, page = 1, perPage = 25) =>
   129→    request<ApiResponse<SemanticRelease[]>>(`/projects/${projectId}/semantic-releases?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}`),
   130→  get: (id: string) =>
   131→    request<ApiResponse<SemanticRelease>>(`/semantic-releases/${id}`),
   132→  delete: (id: string) =>
   133→    request<ApiResponse<null>>(`/semantic-releases/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" }),
   134→  getSources: (id: string) =>
   135→    request<ApiResponse<Release[]>>(`/semantic-releases/${id}/sources`),
   136→};
   137→
   138→// --- Agent ---
   139→
   140→export const agent = {
   141→  triggerRun: (projectId: string, version?: string) =>
   142→    request<ApiResponse<AgentRun>>(`/projects/${projectId}/agent/run`, {
   143→      method: "POST",
   144→      body: JSON.stringify({ trigger: "test", version: version || undefined }),
   145→    }),
   146→  listRuns: (projectId: string, page = 1) =>
   147→    request<ApiResponse<AgentRun[]>>(`/projects/${projectId}/agent/runs?page=${page}`),
   148→  getRun: (id: string) =>
   149→    request<ApiResponse<AgentRun>>(`/agent-runs/${id}`),
   150→};
   151→
   152→// --- Subscriptions ---
   153→
   154→export const subscriptions = {
   155→  list: (page = 1, perPage = 100) =>
   156→    request<ApiResponse<Subscription[]>>(`/subscriptions?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}`),
   157→  get: (id: string) => request<ApiResponse<Subscription>>(`/subscriptions/${id}`),
   158→  create: (input: SubscriptionInput) =>
   159→    request<ApiResponse<Subscription>>("/subscriptions", {
   160→      method: "POST",
   161→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   162→    }),
   163→  batchCreate: (input: BatchSubscriptionInput) =>
   164→    request<ApiResponse<Subscription[]>>("/subscriptions/batch", {
   165→      method: "POST",
   166→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   167→    }),
   168→  update: (id: string, input: SubscriptionInput) =>
   169→    request<ApiResponse<Subscription>>(`/subscriptions/${id}`, {
   170→      method: "PUT",
   171→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   172→    }),
   173→  delete: (id: string) =>
   174→    request<ApiResponse<null>>(`/subscriptions/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" }),
   175→  batchDelete: (input: BatchDeleteSubscriptionInput) =>
   176→    request<ApiResponse<null>>("/subscriptions/batch", {
   177→      method: "DELETE",
   178→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   179→    }),
   180→};
   181→
   182→// --- Notification Channels ---
   183→
   184→export const channels = {
   185→  list: (page = 1, perPage = 100) =>
   186→    request<ApiResponse<NotificationChannel[]>>(`/channels?page=${page}&per_page=${perPage}`),
   187→  get: (id: string) => request<ApiResponse<NotificationChannel>>(`/channels/${id}`),
   188→  create: (input: ChannelInput) =>
   189→    request<ApiResponse<NotificationChannel>>("/channels", {
   190→      method: "POST",
   191→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   192→    }),
   193→  update: (id: string, input: ChannelInput) =>
   194→    request<ApiResponse<NotificationChannel>>(`/channels/${id}`, {
   195→      method: "PUT",
   196→      body: JSON.stringify(input),
   197→    }),
   198→  delete: (id: string) =>
   199→    request<ApiResponse<null>>(`/channels/${id}`, { method: "DELETE" }),
   200→  test: (id: string) =>
   201→    request<ApiResponse<{ status: string }>>(`/channels/${id}/test`, {
   202→      method: "POST",
   203→    }),
   204→};
   205→
   206→// --- Todos ---
   207→
   208→export const todos = {
   209→  list: (status?: string, page = 1, perPage = 25, aggregated = false) => {
   210→    const params = new URLSearchParams({ page: String(page), per_page: String(perPage) });
   211→    if (status) params.set("status", status);
   212→    if (aggregated) params.set("aggregated", "true");
   213→    return request<ApiResponse<Todo[]>>(`/todos?${params}`);
   214→  },
   215→  get: (id: string) =>
   216→    request<ApiResponse<Todo>>(`/todos/${id}`),
   217→  acknowledge: (id: string, cascade = false) =>
   218→    request<ApiResponse<{ status: string }>>(`/todos/${id}/acknowledge${cascade ? '?cascade=true' : ''}`, { method: "PATCH" }),
   219→  resolve: (id: string, cascade = false) =>
   220→    request<ApiResponse<{ status: string }>>(`/todos/${id}/resolve${cascade ? '?cascade=true' : ''}`, { method: "PATCH" }),
   221→  reopen: (id: string) =>
   222→    request<ApiResponse<{ status: string }>>(`/todos/${id}/reopen`, { method: "PATCH" }),
   223→};
   224→
   225→// --- System ---
   226→
   227→export const system = {
   228→  health: () => request<HealthStatus>("/health"),
   229→  stats: () => request<ApiResponse<Stats>>("/stats"),
   230→  trend: (granularity: "daily" | "weekly" | "monthly" = "daily", days = 7) =>
   231→    request<ApiResponse<TrendData>>(`/stats/trend?granularity=${granularity}&days=${days}`),
   232→};
   233→
   234→// --- Discovery ---
   235→
   236→export const discover = {
   237→  github: (params?: { q?: string; language?: string }) => {
   238→    const search = new URLSearchParams();
   239→    if (params?.q) search.set("q", params.q);
   240→    if (params?.language) search.set("language", params.language);
   241→    const qs = search.toString();
   242→    return request<ApiResponse<DiscoverItem[]>>(`/discover/github${qs ? `?${qs}` : ""}`);
   243→  },
   244→  dockerhub: (params?: { q?: string }) => {
   245→    const search = new URLSearchParams();
   246→    if (params?.q) search.set("q", params.q);
   247→    const qs = search.toString();
   248→    return request<ApiResponse<DiscoverItem[]>>(`/discover/dockerhub${qs ? `?${qs}` : ""}`);
   249→  },
   250→};
   251→

494→func (s *PgStore) GetRelease(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.Release, error) {
   495→	var rel models.Release
   496→	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
   497→		`SELECT r.id, r.source_id, r.version, COALESCE(r.raw_data,'{}'), r.released_at, r.created_at,
   498→		        COALESCE(p.id::text,''), COALESCE(p.name,''), COALESCE(s.provider,''), COALESCE(s.repository,''),
   499→		        COALESCE(sr_info.id::text,''), COALESCE(sr_info.status,''), COALESCE(sr_info.urgency,'')
   500→		 FROM releases r
   501→		 LEFT JOIN sources s ON r.source_id = s.id
   502→		 LEFT JOIN projects p ON s.project_id = p.id
   503→		 LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
   504→		     (SELECT sr.id, sr.status, sr.report->>'urgency' AS urgency, 0 AS priority
   505→		      FROM semantic_releases sr
   506→		      WHERE sr.project_id = p.id AND sr.version = r.version
   507→		      ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1)
   508→		     UNION ALL
   509→		     (SELECT NULL::uuid, 'processing', '', 1
   510→		      FROM agent_runs ar
   511→		      WHERE ar.project_id = p.id AND ar.version = r.version
   512→		        AND ar.status IN ('pending', 'running')
   513→		      LIMIT 1)
   514→		     ORDER BY priority LIMIT 1
   515→		 ) sr_info ON true
   516→		 WHERE r.id = $1`, id,
   517→	).Scan(&rel.ID, &rel.SourceID, &rel.Version, &rel.RawData, &rel.ReleasedAt, &rel.CreatedAt,
   518→		&rel.ProjectID, &rel.ProjectName, &rel.Provider, &rel.Repository,
   519→		&rel.SemanticReleaseID, &rel.SemanticReleaseStatus, &rel.SemanticReleaseUrgency)
   520→	if err != nil {
   521→		return nil, err
   522→	}
   523→	return &rel, nil
   524→}
   525→
   526→// --- SubscriptionsStore ---
   527→
   528→func (s *PgStore) ListSubscriptions(ctx context.Context, page, perPage int) ([]models.Subscription, int, error) {
   529→	var total int
   530→	err := s.pool.QueryRow(ctx, `SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscriptions`).Scan(&total)
   531→	if err != nil {
   532→		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("count subscriptions: %w", err)
   533→	}
   534→	offset := (page - 1) * perPage
   535→	rows, err := s.pool.Query(ctx,
   536→		`SELECT id, channel_id, type, source_id, project_id, COALESCE(version_filter,''), created_at
   537→		 FROM subscriptions ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $1 OFFSET $2`, perPage, offset)
   538→	if err != nil {
   539→		return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("list subscriptions: %w", err)
   540→	}
   541→	defer rows.Close()
   542→	var subs []models.Subscription
   543→	for rows.Next() {
   544→		var sub models.Subscription
   545→		if err := rows.Scan(&sub.ID, &sub.ChannelID, &sub.Type, &sub.SourceID,
   546→			&sub.ProjectID, &sub.VersionFilter, &sub.CreatedAt); err != nil {
   547→			return nil, 0, fmt.Errorf("scan subscription: %w", err)
   548→		}
   549→		subs = append(subs, sub)
   550→	}
   551→	return subs, total, nil
   552→}
   553→
   554→func (s *PgStore) CreateSubscription(ctx context.Context, sub *models.Subscription) error {
   555→	return s.pool.QueryRow(ctx,
   556→		`INSERT INTO subscriptions (channel_id, type, source_id, project_id, version_filter)
   557→		 VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
   558→		 RETURNING id, created_at`,
   559→		sub.ChannelID, sub.Type, sub.SourceID, sub.ProjectID, sub.VersionFilter,
   560→	).Scan(&sub.ID, &sub.CreatedAt)
   561→}
   562→
   563→func (s *PgStore) CreateSubscriptionBatch(ctx context.Context, subs []models.Subscription) ([]models.Subscription, error) {

1→package queue
     2→
     3→import "github.com/riverqueue/river"
     4→
     5→// NotifyJobArgs is enqueued when a new source release is detected.
     6→// The worker sends notifications to source-level subscribers.
     7→type NotifyJobArgs struct {
     8→	ReleaseID string `json:"release_id"`
     9→	SourceID  string `json:"source_id"`
    10→}
    11→
    12→func (NotifyJobArgs) Kind() string { return "notify_release" }
    13→
    14→var _ river.JobArgs = NotifyJobArgs{}
    15→
    16→// AgentJobArgs is enqueued when an agent run is triggered.
    17→// The worker runs the LLM agent to produce a semantic release.
    18→type AgentJobArgs struct {
    19→	AgentRunID string `json:"agent_run_id"`
    20→	ProjectID  string `json:"project_id"`
    21→	Version    string `json:"version"`
    22→}
    23→
    24→func (AgentJobArgs) Kind() string { return "agent_run" }
    25→
    26→var _ river.JobArgs = AgentJobArgs{}
    27→

1→package db
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→
     7→	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
     8→	"github.com/riverqueue/river/riverdriver/riverpgxv5"
     9→	"github.com/riverqueue/river/rivermigrate"
    10→)
    11→
    12→const schema = `
    13→-- Tracked software projects (the central entity)
    14→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS projects (
    15→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    16→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    17→    description TEXT,
    18→    agent_prompt TEXT,
    19→    agent_rules JSONB,
    20→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    21→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    22→);
    23→
    24→-- Configured ingestion sources (polling-based: GitHub, Docker Hub)
    25→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS sources (
    26→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    27→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    28→    provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    29→    repository VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    30→    poll_interval_seconds INT DEFAULT 86400,
    31→    enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
    32→    config JSONB,
    33→    last_polled_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    34→    last_error TEXT,
    35→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    36→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    37→    UNIQUE(provider, repository)
    38→);
    39→
    40→-- Context sources (read-only references for agent research)
    41→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS context_sources (
    42→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    43→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    44→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    45→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    46→    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    47→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    48→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    49→);
    50→
    51→-- Source-level releases (detected from polling sources)
    52→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS releases (
    53→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    54→    source_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    55→    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    56→    raw_data JSONB,
    57→    released_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    58→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    59→    UNIQUE(source_id, version)
    60→);
    61→
    62→-- Project-level semantic releases (AI-generated, correlating source releases)
    63→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_releases (
    64→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    65→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    66→    version VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    67→    report JSONB,
    68→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
    69→    error TEXT,
    70→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    71→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
    72→    UNIQUE(project_id, version)
    73→);
    74→
    75→-- Join table: which source releases compose a semantic release
    76→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS semantic_release_sources (
    77→    semantic_release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    78→    release_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    79→    PRIMARY KEY (semantic_release_id, release_id)
    80→);
    81→
    82→-- Notification channels (standalone)
    83→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notification_channels (
    84→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    85→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
    86→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
    87→    config JSONB NOT NULL,
    88→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
    89→    updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
    90→);
    91→
    92→-- Subscriptions: two types (source releases and semantic releases)
    93→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscriptions (
    94→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    95→    channel_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES notification_channels(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    96→    type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release')),
    97→    source_id UUID REFERENCES sources(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    98→    project_id UUID REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
    99→    version_filter TEXT,
   100→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   101→    CHECK (
   102→        (type = 'source_release'   AND source_id  IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   103→        (type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id  IS NULL)
   104→    )
   105→);
   106→
   107→-- Agent runs (scoped to project)
   108→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS agent_runs (
   109→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   110→    project_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES projects(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   111→    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   112→    trigger VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   113→    status VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   114→    prompt_used TEXT,
   115→    error TEXT,
   116→    started_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   117→    completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   118→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW()
   119→);
   120→
   121→ALTER TABLE agent_runs ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version VARCHAR(100);
   122→
   123→-- API authentication keys
   124→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS api_keys (
   125→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   126→    name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
   127→    key_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   128→    key_prefix VARCHAR(12) NOT NULL,
   129→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   130→    last_used_at TIMESTAMPTZ
   131→);
   132→
   133→-- Trigger for SSE: notify on new releases
   134→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_release_created() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   135→BEGIN
   136→    PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   137→    RETURN NEW;
   138→END;
   139→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   140→
   141→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS release_created_trigger ON releases;
   142→CREATE TRIGGER release_created_trigger
   143→    AFTER INSERT ON releases
   144→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_release_created();
   145→
   146→-- Trigger for SSE: notify on semantic release completion
   147→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release() RETURNS trigger AS $$
   148→BEGIN
   149→    IF NEW.status = 'completed' AND (OLD IS NULL OR OLD.status != 'completed') THEN
   150→        PERFORM pg_notify('release_events', json_build_object('type', 'semantic_release', 'id', NEW.id)::text);
   151→    END IF;
   152→    RETURN NEW;
   153→END;
   154→$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
   155→
   156→DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS semantic_release_trigger ON semantic_releases;
   157→CREATE TRIGGER semantic_release_trigger
   158→    AFTER INSERT OR UPDATE ON semantic_releases
   159→    FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE FUNCTION notify_semantic_release();
   160→
   161→-- Release TODOs (acknowledge/resolve tracking)
   162→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS release_todos (
   163→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   164→    release_id UUID REFERENCES releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   165→    semantic_release_id UUID REFERENCES semantic_releases(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   166→    status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   167→    created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT NOW(),
   168→    acknowledged_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   169→    resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
   170→    CHECK (
   171→        (release_id IS NOT NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NULL) OR
   172→        (release_id IS NULL AND semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL)
   173→    )
   174→);
   175→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_release_id ON release_todos(release_id) WHERE release_id IS NOT NULL;
   176→CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_release_todos_semantic_release_id ON release_todos(semantic_release_id) WHERE semantic_release_id IS NOT NULL;
   177→`
   178→
   179→// RunMigrations applies River's schema and the application schema. Idempotent — safe to call on every startup.
   180→func RunMigrations(ctx context.Context, pool *pgxpool.Pool) error {
   181→	migrator, err := rivermigrate.New(riverpgxv5.New(pool), nil)
   182→	if err != nil {
   183→		return fmt.Errorf("create river migrator: %w", err)
   184→	}
   185→	if _, err := migrator.Migrate(ctx, rivermigrate.DirectionUp, nil); err != nil {
   186→		return fmt.Errorf("river migrations: %w", err)
   187→	}
   188→
   189→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, schema); err != nil {
   190→		return fmt.Errorf("app migrations: %w", err)
   191→	}
   192→
   193→	// Migrate existing subscription type values: source→source_release, project→semantic_release.
   194→	// Drop old CHECK constraints first (both the named type check and the unnamed
   195→	// composite check referencing old values), then UPDATE data, then re-add constraints.
   196→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   197→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_type_check;
   198→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS subscriptions_check;
   199→		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'source_release' WHERE type = 'source';
   200→		UPDATE subscriptions SET type = 'semantic_release' WHERE type = 'project';
   201→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_type_check CHECK (type IN ('source_release', 'semantic_release'));
   202→		ALTER TABLE subscriptions ADD CONSTRAINT subscriptions_check CHECK (
   203→			(type = 'source_release'   AND source_id IS NOT NULL AND project_id IS NULL) OR
   204→			(type = 'semantic_release' AND project_id IS NOT NULL AND source_id IS NULL)
   205→		);
   206→	`); err != nil {
   207→		return fmt.Errorf("subscription type migration: %w", err)
   208→	}
   209→
   210→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   211→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_include TEXT;
   212→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version_filter_exclude TEXT;
   213→	`); err != nil {
   214→		return fmt.Errorf("source version filter migration: %w", err)
   215→	}
   216→
   217→	if _, err := pool.Exec(ctx, `
   218→		ALTER TABLE sources ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS exclude_prereleases BOOLEAN DEFAULT false;
   219→	`); err != nil {
   220→		return fmt.Errorf("source exclude_prereleases migration: %w", err)
   221→	}
   222→	return nil
   223→}
   224→

package api

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
)

// Dependencies holds all external dependencies required for registering API routes.
type Dependencies struct {
	DB                    *pgxpool.Pool
	ProjectsStore         ProjectsStore
	ReleasesStore         ReleasesStore
	SubscriptionsStore    SubscriptionsStore
	SourcesStore          SourcesStore
	ChannelsStore         ChannelsStore
	ContextSourcesStore   ContextSourcesStore
	SemanticReleasesStore SemanticReleasesStore
	AgentStore            AgentStore
	TodosStore            TodosStore
	PublicURL             string
	KeyStore              KeyStore
	HealthChecker         HealthChecker
	Broadcaster           *Broadcaster
	NoAuth                bool
	IngestionService      *ingestion.Service
	HTTPClient            *http.Client
}

// RegisterRoutes registers all API v1 routes on the given ServeMux.
func RegisterRoutes(mux *http.ServeMux, deps Dependencies) {
	// Public chain: no auth required.
	publicChain := Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery)

	// Authenticated chain: includes auth unless NoAuth is set.
	chain := publicChain
	if !deps.NoAuth {
		chain = Chain(RequestID, Logger, Recovery, RateLimit(10, 20), Auth(deps.KeyStore))
	}

	// Projects (CRUD)
	projects := NewProjectsHandler(deps.ProjectsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/projects/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(projects.Delete)))

	// Sources (nested under projects)
	sources := NewSourcesHandler(deps.SourcesStore, deps.IngestionService, deps.HTTPClient)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.Delete)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/sources/{id}/poll", chain(http.HandlerFunc(sources.FetchReleases)))

	// Context Sources (nested under projects)
	contextSources := NewContextSourcesHandler(deps.ContextSourcesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/context-sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/context-sources/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(contextSources.Delete)))

	// Releases (read-only, nested under sources and projects)
	releases := NewReleasesHandler(deps.ReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/sources/{id}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListBySource)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.ListByProject)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(releases.Get)))

	// Semantic Releases (nested under projects + top-level list)
	semanticReleases := NewSemanticReleasesHandler(deps.SemanticReleasesStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListAll)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/semantic-releases", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Get)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}/sources", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.ListSources)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/semantic-releases/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(semanticReleases.Delete)))

	// Subscriptions (CRUD)
	subscriptions := NewSubscriptionsHandler(deps.SubscriptionsStore)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Create)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchCreate)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/batch", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.BatchDelete)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/subscriptions/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(subscriptions.Delete)))

	// Channels (CRUD + test)
	channels := NewChannelsHandler(deps.ChannelsStore, routing.NewSenders(), deps.PublicURL)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.List)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Create)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PUT /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Update)))
	mux.Handle("DELETE /api/v1/channels/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Delete)))
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/channels/{id}/test", chain(http.HandlerFunc(channels.Test)))

	// Agent
	agent := NewAgentHandler(deps.AgentStore)
	mux.Handle("POST /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/run", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.TriggerRun)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/projects/{projectId}/agent/runs", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.ListRuns)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/agent-runs/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(agent.GetRun)))

	// Todos
	todos := NewTodosHandler(deps.TodosStore, deps.PublicURL)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.List)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Get)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))
	mux.Handle("PATCH /api/v1/todos/{id}/reopen", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Reopen)))
	// One-click endpoints for notification links (GET so they work as <a href>)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/acknowledge", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Acknowledge)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/todos/{id}/resolve", chain(http.HandlerFunc(todos.Resolve)))

	// Providers (metadata — static, no store needed)
	providers := NewProvidersHandler()
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/providers", chain(http.HandlerFunc(providers.List)))

	// Discovery (public — no auth, proxies external APIs)
	discover := NewDiscoverHandler(deps.HTTPClient, "", "")
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/github", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.GitHub)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/discover/dockerhub", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(discover.DockerHub)))

	// SSE events
	events := NewEventsHandler(deps.Broadcaster)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/events", chain(http.HandlerFunc(events.Stream)))

	// Health (public — no auth middleware)
	health := NewHealthHandler(deps.HealthChecker)
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/health", publicChain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Check)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Stats)))
	mux.Handle("GET /api/v1/stats/trend", chain(http.HandlerFunc(health.Trend)))
}

1→package main
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"log/slog"
     6→	"net/http"
     7→	"os"
     8→	"os/signal"
     9→	"time"
    10→
    11→	"github.com/riverqueue/river"
    12→	agentpkg "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent"
    13→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/api"
    14→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/db"
    15→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/ingestion"
    16→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/queue"
    17→	"github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/routing"
    18→)
    19→
    20→func main() {
    21→	// Configure log level from LOG_LEVEL env (debug, info, warn, error).
    22→	logLevel := new(slog.LevelVar) // defaults to Info
    23→	switch os.Getenv("LOG_LEVEL") {
    24→	case "debug":
    25→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelDebug)
    26→	case "warn":
    27→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelWarn)
    28→	case "error":
    29→		logLevel.Set(slog.LevelError)
    30→	}
    31→	slog.SetDefault(slog.New(slog.NewTextHandler(os.Stderr, &slog.HandlerOptions{Level: logLevel})))
    32→
    33→	ctx, stop := signal.NotifyContext(context.Background(), os.Interrupt)
    34→	defer stop()
    35→
    36→	dbURL := envOr("DATABASE_URL", "postgres://localhost:5432/changelogue?sslmode=disable")
    37→	addr := envOr("LISTEN_ADDR", ":8080")
    38→	noAuth := os.Getenv("NO_AUTH") == "true"
    39→
    40→	// Database
    41→	pool, err := db.NewPool(ctx, dbURL)
    42→	if err != nil {
    43→		slog.Error("database connection failed", "err", err)
    44→		os.Exit(1)
    45→	}
    46→	defer pool.Close()
    47→
    48→	if err := db.RunMigrations(ctx, pool); err != nil {
    49→		slog.Error("migrations failed", "err", err)
    50→		os.Exit(1)
    51→	}
    52→
    53→	// API & routing store (created before River so we can register workers)
    54→	// The river client is set to nil initially; TriggerAgentRun (which needs it)
    55→	// won't be called until the server is up and the client is set below.
    56→	pgStore := api.NewPgStore(pool, nil)
    57→
    58→	// Register River workers
    59→	workers := river.NewWorkers()
    60→	notifyWorker := routing.NewNotifyWorker(pgStore, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    61→	river.AddWorker(workers, notifyWorker)
    62→
    63→	// Agent worker: requires an LLM API key. If unavailable, agent jobs
    64→	// will remain in the queue until the key is configured and the server
    65→	// is restarted.
    66→	llmProvider := envOr("LLM_PROVIDER", "gemini")
    67→	llmModelDefault := "gemini-2.5-flash"
    68→	if llmProvider == "openai" {
    69→		llmModelDefault = "gpt-5.2"
    70→	}
    71→	llmConfig := agentpkg.LLMConfig{
    72→		Provider:      llmProvider,
    73→		Model:         envOr("LLM_MODEL", llmModelDefault),
    74→		GoogleAPIKey:  os.Getenv("GOOGLE_API_KEY"),
    75→		OpenAIAPIKey:  os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    76→		OpenAIBaseURL: os.Getenv("OPENAI_BASE_URL"),
    77→	}
    78→	agentOrchestrator, err := agentpkg.NewOrchestrator(pgStore, llmConfig, os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"))
    79→	if err != nil {
    80→		slog.Warn("agent orchestrator not available — agent jobs will not be processed", "err", err)
    81→	} else {
    82→		agentWorker := agentpkg.NewAgentWorker(agentOrchestrator, pgStore)
    83→		river.AddWorker(workers, agentWorker)
    84→		slog.Info("agent worker registered")
    85→	}
    86→
    87→	riverClient, err := queue.NewRiverClient(pool, workers)
    88→	if err != nil {
    89→		slog.Error("river client failed", "err", err)
    90→		os.Exit(1)
    91→	}
    92→
    93→	// Now that the river client exists, set it on the existing pgStore so that
    94→	// all holders (including NotifyWorker) can enqueue agent jobs.
    95→	pgStore.SetRiverClient(riverClient)
    96→
    97→	if err := riverClient.Start(ctx); err != nil {
    98→		slog.Error("river start failed", "err", err)
    99→		os.Exit(1)
   100→	}
   101→
   102→	// Ingestion layer
   103→	ingestionStore := ingestion.NewPgStore(pool, riverClient)
   104→	svc := ingestion.NewService(ingestionStore)
   105→
   106→	loader := ingestion.NewSourceLoader(pool, http.DefaultClient)
   107→	orch := ingestion.NewOrchestrator(svc, loader, pool, 5*time.Minute)
   108→
   109→	broadcaster := api.NewBroadcaster()
   110→
   111→	mux := http.NewServeMux()
   112→
   113→	// Serve frontend static export if available
   114→	if info, err := os.Stat("web/out"); err == nil && info.IsDir() {
   115→		api.RegisterFrontend(mux, "web/out")
   116→		slog.Info("serving frontend from web/out")
   117→	}
   118→
   119→	// Register all API v1 routes
   120→	api.RegisterRoutes(mux, api.Dependencies{
   121→		DB:                    pool,
   122→		ProjectsStore:         pgStore,
   123→		ReleasesStore:         pgStore,
   124→		SubscriptionsStore:    pgStore,
   125→		SourcesStore:          pgStore,
   126→		ChannelsStore:         pgStore,
   127→		ContextSourcesStore:   pgStore,
   128→		SemanticReleasesStore: pgStore,
   129→		AgentStore:            pgStore,
   130→		TodosStore:            pgStore,
   131→		PublicURL:             os.Getenv("PUBLIC_URL"),
   132→		KeyStore:              pgStore,
   133→		HealthChecker:         pgStore,
   134→		Broadcaster:           broadcaster,
   135→		NoAuth:                noAuth,
   136→		IngestionService:      svc,
   137→		HTTPClient:            http.DefaultClient,
   138→	})
   139→
   140→	srv := &http.Server{Addr: addr, Handler: api.CORS(mux)}
   141→
   142→	// Start polling in background
   143→	go orch.Run(ctx)
   144→
   145→	// Start PostgreSQL LISTEN/NOTIFY → SSE bridge
   146→	go api.ListenForNotifications(ctx, pool, broadcaster)
   147→
   148→	// Start HTTP server
   149→	go func() {
   150→		slog.Info("server starting", "addr", srv.Addr)
   151→		if err := srv.ListenAndServe(); err != http.ErrServerClosed {
   152→			slog.Error("server error", "err", err)
   153→		}
   154→	}()
   155→
   156→	<-ctx.Done()
   157→	slog.Info("shutting down")
   158→
   159→	shutdownCtx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 10*time.Second)
   160→	defer cancel()
   161→	riverClient.Stop(shutdownCtx)
   162→	srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx)
   163→}
   164→
   165→func envOr(key, fallback string) string {
   166→	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
   167→		return v
   168→	}
   169→	return fallback
   170→}
   171→

1→package agent
     2→
     3→import (
     4→	"context"

     6→
     7→	"google.golang.org/adk/model"
     8→	"google.golang.org/adk/model/gemini"

    10→
    11→	oaimodel "github.com/sentioxyz/changelogue/internal/agent/openai"
    12→)
    13→
    14→// LLMConfig holds the configuration for creating an LLM model.
    15→type LLMConfig struct {
    16→	Provider string // "gemini" or "openai"
    17→	Model    string // e.g. "gemini-2.5-flash", "gpt-5.2"
    18→
    19→	// Gemini
    20→	GoogleAPIKey string
    21→
    22→	// OpenAI
    23→	OpenAIAPIKey  string
    24→	OpenAIBaseURL string // defaults to https://api.openai.com/v1
    25→}
    26→
    27→// NewLLMModel creates a model.LLM based on the configured provider.
    28→// wsConfig is optional and only applies to the OpenAI provider; it enables
    29→// the Responses API built-in web_search tool on the created model.
    30→func NewLLMModel(ctx context.Context, cfg LLMConfig, wsConfig *oaimodel.WebSearch) (model.LLM, error) {
    31→	switch cfg.Provider {
    32→	case "gemini", "":
    33→		if cfg.GoogleAPIKey == "" {
    34→			return nil, fmt.Errorf("GOOGLE_API_KEY is required for gemini provider")
    35→		}
    36→		return gemini.NewModel(ctx, cfg.Model, &genai.ClientConfig{
    37→			APIKey: cfg.GoogleAPIKey,
    38→		})
    39→
    40→	case "openai":
    41→		return oaimodel.NewModel(ctx, cfg.Model, oaimodel.Config{
    42→			APIKey:  cfg.OpenAIAPIKey,
    43→			BaseURL: cfg.OpenAIBaseURL,
    44→		}, wsConfig)
    45→
    46→	default:
    47→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("unknown LLM provider: %q (supported: gemini, openai)", cfg.Provider)
    48→	}
    49→}

    10→// TodosStore defines the data access interface for TODO operations.
    11→type TodosStore interface {
    12→	ListTodos(ctx context.Context, status string, page, perPage int, aggregated bool) ([]models.Todo, int, error)
    13→	GetTodo(ctx context.Context, id string) (*models.Todo, error)
    14→	AcknowledgeTodo(ctx context.Context, id string, cascade bool) error
    15→	ResolveTodo(ctx context.Context, id string, cascade bool) error
    16→	ReopenTodo(ctx context.Context, id string) error
    17→}
    18→
    19→// TodosHandler handles HTTP requests for release TODOs.
    20→type TodosHandler struct {
    21→	store     TodosStore
    22→	publicURL string
    23→}
    24→
    25→// NewTodosHandler creates a new TodosHandler.
    26→func NewTodosHandler(store TodosStore, publicURL string) *TodosHandler {
    27→	return &TodosHandler{store: store, publicURL: publicURL}
    28→}
    29→
    30→// List returns a paginated list of TODOs, optionally filtered by status.
    31→func (h *TodosHandler) List(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
    32→	page, perPage := ParsePagination(r)
    33→	status := r.URL.Query().Get("status")
    34→	aggregated := r.URL.Query().Get("aggregated") == "true"
    35→
    36→	todos, total, err := h.store.ListTodos(r.Context(), status, page, perPage, aggregated)
    37→	if err != nil {
    38→		RespondError(w, r, http.StatusInternalServerError, "internal_error", err.Error())
    39→		return
    40→	}
    41→	if todos == nil {
    42→		todos = []models.Todo{}
    43→	}
    44→	RespondList(w, r, http.StatusOK, todos, page, perPage, total)
    45→}

    50→	todo, err := h.store.GetTodo(r.Context(), id)

    26→const BASE = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || "/api/v1";
    27→
    28→async function request<T>(path: string, init?: RequestInit): Promise<T> {
    29→  const res = await fetch(`${BASE}${path}`, {
    30→    headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", ...init?.headers },
    31→    ...init,
    32→  });
    33→  if (!res.ok) {
    34→    const body = await res.json().catch(() => null);
    35→    throw new Error(body?.error?.message ?? `Request failed: ${res.status}`);
    36→  }
    37→  if (res.status === 204) return null as T;
    38→  return res.json();
    39→}
